apihelp-growthstarmentee-summary: Calaamadee ama ka qaad calaamadda la tashanayaasha inuu yahay xiddig leh ee isticmaalaha hadda (si gaar ah ayaa loo kaydiyaa lamana diiwaangeliyo)
apihelp-query+growthstarredmentees-summa: Hel liiska La tashanayaasha xiddigga loo saaray ee lataliyaha hadda soo galay
apihelp-growthsetmentorstatus-summary: Deji xaaladda latalinta isticmaalaha hadda mid firfircoon/maqan
apihelp-growthsetmentorstatus-param-gesb: Marka lataliye loo dejinayo maqan, waa in la cayimaa muddada maqnaanshaha (maalmo ahaan).
apihelp-query+growthmentorstatus-summary: Hubi xaaladda latalinta ee isticmaalaha hadda
apihelp-growthmentordashboardupdatedata-: Qorshee cusboonaysiin degdeg ah oo lagu sameeyo module-ka guudmar La tashanayaasha ee dashboard-ka lataliyaha. Waxaad kaliya qorsheyn kartaa hal cusboonaysiin labadii saacadoodba mar sababo la xiriira waxqabadka.
apihelp-growthsetmenteestatus-summary: Deji xaaladda La tashanaha (waxay u oggolaanaysaa La-tashanayaasha inay shiddaan/damiyyaan module-ka latalinta, ama inay gebi ahaanba ka baxaan, taas oo tirtiraysa xiriirka La tashane/Lataliye).
apihelp-growthsetmenteestatus-param-stat: Xaaladda cusub ee La tashanaha (digniin: haddii tan loo dejiyo ka-bixid, waxay si joogto ah u tirtiraysaa xiriirka La tashane/Lataliye)
Module-ka latalinta si buuxda ayaa loo damiyay. Tani badanaa waxaa dejisa software-ka waxaana loo isticmaalaa tijaabooyinka A/B.
La-tashanaha ayaa ka baxay latalinta; xiriirka La-tashane/Lataliye waa la tirtiri doonaa, module-ka latalintana waxaa lagu beddeli doonaa ikhtiyaar dib loogu soo noqon karo.
apihelp-query+growthmenteestatus-summary: Hubi xaaladda La-tashanaha ee isticmaalaha hadda; eeg dukumeentiga action=growthsetmenteestatus si aad u hesho faahfaahin ku saabsan xaaladaha kala duwan ee shaqsiyeed.
apihelp-query+growthmentormentee-summary: Hel dhammaan La tashanayaasha loo qoondeeyay Lataliye la bixiyay
apihelp-growthmanagementorlist-summary: Maamul macluumaadka ku jira liiska lataliyeyaasha ee qaabaysan (badanaa lagu kaydiyo [[MediaWiki:GrowthMentors.json]]). Module-kan waxaa isticmaali kara lataliyeyaasha hadda iyo kuwa mustaqbalka (si ay isu daraan ama u beddelaan faahfaahintooda) iyo sidoo kale maamulayaasha (dhammaan isticmaaleyaasha).
apihelp-growthmanagementorlist-param-mes: Fariinta hordhaca ah (isticmaal xaraf madhan si aad u isticmaasho fariinta lataliyaha ee caadiga ah)
apihelp-growthmanagementorlist-param-isa: Lataliyuhu ma maqan yahay hadda? Waa in la dejiyo (si caadi ah waa false).
apihelp-growthmanagementorlist-param-awa: Ila iyo goorma ayuu lataliyuhu maqnaanayaa? Ugu badnaan waa 1 sano laga bilaabo maanta. Lama tixgeliyo haddii isaway ay tahay true.
apihelp-growthmanagementorlist-param-use: Magaca isticmaalaha lataliyaha uu isbeddelku saameeyay. Haddii aan la bixin, waxaa la adeegsanayaa isticmaalaha hadda soo galay. Waxa kaliya isticmaali kara isticmaaleyaasha leh oggolaansho gaar ah.
growthexperiments-api-managementors-erro: Haddii isaway ay tahay true, markaa waa in la bixiyo awaytimestamp.
apihelp-growthinvalidatepersonalizedprai: Waxay baabi'isaa talo la tashanayaasha lagu ammaanay oo ku jira module-ka ammaanta shakhsiyeed ee dashboard-ka lataliyaha.
Ka bood sababta loo burinayo talada
